title: [BUG] PowerBI blob export - Cell styles not identical in ExcelJS
author: slussier
body: ## 🐛 Bug Report I'm using ExcelJS to concat all my PowerBI Blob into a single workbook. PowerBI return this font style structure: ```json ``` Since ExcelJS seems to not support val="0" for style font, all cells are bold, italic and striked. Lib version: 4.4.0 ## Steps To Reproduce You can use PowerBI exporter and use this file. Otherwise, create an Excel File and add `` on xl/styles.xml and use this to import this sheet in a new ExcelJS wokbook. ## The expected behaviour: Cell style font with val="0" shouldn't apply on cell.
